evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2600);try{MOS.nav('config')}catch(e){}await w(2200);try{MOS.setCfgTab('infra')}catch(e){}await w(4500);const c=document.getElementById('infraContenedor');const admBtn=[...c.querySelectorAll('button')].find(el=>/Administradores/.test(el.textContent||'')&&/panel MOS/.test(el.textContent||''));const out={found:!!admBtn};if(admBtn)admBtn.click();await w(1400);const adm2=[...document.querySelectorAll('#infraContenedor button')].find(el=>/Administradores/.test(el.textContent||'')&&/panel MOS/.test(el.textContent||''));if(adm2){const card=adm2.closest('.card');out.admCards=card.querySelectorAll('.pers-card-wrap').length;out.admTxt=adm2.textContent.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().slice(0,50);card.querySelectorAll('.pers-card-wrap')[0]?.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});}await w(700);out.ov=document.documentElement.scrollWidth>innerWidth+1;return out;})()
